name: webperf-mcp
description: Read-only access to your sites and test results from api.webperf.se.
long_description:
Gives premium users of api.webperf.se read-only access to their own sites and test results, so you can ask about accessibility, performance, standards and security scores in plain language.

The server runs locally on your machine and is a thin client over the existing public Webperf HTTP API. It adds no privileges of its own: every request carries your personal API key, and all authorization stays server-side at api.webperf.se. It can never show data your key could not already fetch directly, and it exposes only listing and reading — no retesting or other changes.

api_key.title: API key
api_key.description: Your personal premium API key from api.webperf.se. It is stored in your operating system's keychain and sent only to the Webperf API.

api_base.title: API base URL
api_base.description: Leave as-is unless you are testing against a staging environment.

tools.name: list_my_sites
tools.description: List the websites your premium API key can access

tools.name: get_latest_results
tools.description: Get the most recent test results for a site

tools.name: get_test_history
tools.description: Get historical monthly scores for a site

tools.name: list_test_types
tools.description: List Webperf Core test types, to interpret numeric test ids
